label: Build damiao_h7
command: powershell -Command "cmake -S ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/board/damiao_h7 -B ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/build/damiao_h7/Debug --preset Debug -G Ninja; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; cmake --build ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/build/damiao_h7/Debug --config Debug -j $env:NUMBER_OF_PROCESSORS; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Copy-Item -Path ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/build/damiao_h7/Debug/compile_commands.json -Destination ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/build/compile_commands.json -Force; Copy-Item -Path ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/build/damiao_h7/Debug/base.elf -Destination ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/build/damiao_h7.elf -Force"

label: Build dji_c
command: powershell -Command "cmake -S ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/board/dji_c -B ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/build/dji_c/Debug --preset Debug -G Ninja; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; cmake --build ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/build/dji_c/Debug --config Debug -j $env:NUMBER_OF_PROCESSORS; if ($LASTEXITCODE -ne 0) { exit $LASTEXITCODE }; Copy-Item -Path ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/build/dji_c/Debug/compile_commands.json -Destination ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/build/compile_commands.json -Force; Copy-Item -Path ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/build/dji_c/Debug/base.elf -Destination ${ZED_WORKTREE_ROOT}/build/dji_c.elf -Force"
